CustomField.description: The date the program or lender ordered an appraisal. This is an optional field intended to be used for transaction workflow tracking. Tip: Remove this field from your layout if you are not tracking appraisals orders.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
The date the program or lender ordered an appraisal. This is an optional field intended to be used for transaction workflow tracking.
Tip: Remove this field from your layout if you are not tracking appraisals orders.
CustomField.label: Appraisal Ordered
